function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0003
alias: northstar_backfill_gamma
issued_on: 2025-12-01
total_eur: 530
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 185
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 105
    line_eur: 105
---
# Northstar buyer-language sprint invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0003                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_gamma      |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-01                    |
| total_eur      | 530                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 185      | 185      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
| 3 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 105      | 105      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 530      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A backfilled invoice from the period when Miles was trying to make the language sound like one product instead of three.

next_step.current_state: Structured migration write succeeded. Reactive outbox-writing context is not applicable (file was finance invoice, not outbox communication). Next complete inbox workflow by deleting processed inbox file already read.
next_step.observation: The invoice file was updated without tool errors.

next_step.current_state: All required actions done: processed inbox request, updated target note with schema frontmatter preserving body, deleted inbox item per workflow.

function.message: Processed the next inbox note by OCR-structuring the requested invoice record. Added YAML frontmatter to `50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md` using the finance invoice schema fields (including ordered line items) and preserved the original note body verbatim below the frontmatter. Then removed the processed inbox item `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read/context), read nested AGENTS before working in folders, consulted required workflow and schema docs before OCR/frontmatter migration, preserved original body text, kept diff focused, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR and add schema-compliant frontmatter to a specific invoice note; the target note contained visible values for all required invoice fields and line items per `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md`, enabling complete execution without guessing. Post-completion inbox deletion is required by `process-next-inbox-item.md` and `inbox-processing-v2-update.md`.
